executives.name: Brandon Munro
executives.background: Brandon Munro is a lawyer and quantitative economist with over 25 years of experience in the resources and finance sectors. He has been the CEO of Bannerman Energy since 2016 and has extensive experience in uranium market analysis and project development in Namibia.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Executive Officer and Managing Director

executives.name: Gavin Chamberlain
executives.background: Gavin Chamberlain is a highly experienced mining executive with over 30 years in the industry. He has held senior roles in project management and operations, particularly in Africa, including significant experience with major uranium projects.

executives.name: Steve Herlihy
executives.background: Steve Herlihy is a Chartered Accountant with over 30 years of experience in commercial and financial roles. He has served as CFO for several ASX-listed companies and has extensive experience in capital raisings and financial management in the resources sector.

board_of_directors.name: Ronnie Beevor
board_of_directors.background: Ronnie Beevor is an experienced investment banker and mining executive. He was previously Head of Investment Banking at NM Rothschild & Sons (Australia) and has served on the boards of numerous mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Brandon Munro
board_of_directors.background: Brandon Munro is a lawyer and quantitative economist with over 25 years of experience in the resources and finance sectors. He has been the CEO of Bannerman Energy since 2016.

board_of_directors.name: Ian Burvill
board_of_directors.background: Ian Burvill has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry, including roles in engineering, operations, and investment banking. He was a partner at Resource Capital Funds for many years.

board_of_directors.name: Clive Jones
board_of_directors.background: Clive Jones has over 30 years of experience in mineral exploration and management. He has been involved in the discovery and development of numerous mineral deposits and has served as a director of several ASX-listed companies.

board_of_directors.name: Alison Terry
board_of_directors.background: Alison Terry is an experienced corporate executive with a background in sustainability, corporate affairs, and legal. She previously held senior executive roles at Fortescue Metals Group.
